name: Lower Wythoff sequence
description: The positions of the letter 'n' in Wythoff's game — a two-pile Nim variant. Defined as ⌊n·φ⌋ where φ = (1+√5)/2 ≈ 1.618 is the golden ratio. Together with A001950 (Upper Wythoff), it forms a partition of the positive integers. As a (1,1,2,1)-hiccup sequence it reflects a deep connection between self-referential definitions and Beatty sequences.
